**Benefit:** Penalties for fighting with multiple weapons are reduced by â2 with the primary hand and by â6 with off hands.

**Normal:** A creature without this feat takes a â6 penalty on attacks made with its primary hand and a â10 penalty on attacks made with all of its off hands. (It has one primary hand, and all the others are off hands.) See Two-Weapon Fighting.

**Special:** This feat replaces the Two-Weapon Fighting feat for creatures with more than two arms.
